title: parapolystichum davallioides
intro: Parapolystichum davallioides, also known as the 'Davallia fern', is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Parapolystichum davallioides include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and crushed into a powder, which can be steeped in hot water to make a tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
